title: [FIRRTL/LowerToHW] Make use of unused generated random bits

features.name: random initialization with partial bit slicing
features.description: Code should include a register initialization block that assigns multiple narrower fields from a single random value using bit-select and part-select, rather than issuing a separate random invocation per field

features.name: redundant random macro invocations for adjacent register fields
features.description: Code should include two back-to-back RANDOM macro invocations that initialize different fields of logically adjacent registers, where the second invocation uses only a low-index bit that could instead be taken from the first invocation's already-generated bits
